name: The Citizens State Bank And Trust Company
description_short: The Citizens State Bank and Trust Company is an FDIC-insured bank offering online and mobile banking services with deposit accounts backed by federal insurance.
description_long:
The Citizens State Bank and Trust Company operates as a traditional banking institution with FDIC membership, providing customers access to federally-insured deposit accounts. The bank emphasizes security and regulatory compliance through its Member FDIC status, which backs all eligible deposits with the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The institution maintains a digital-first approach with online and mobile banking platforms accessible through their website at extramilebank.com.

The bank offers a range of standard banking services including deposit accounts and online banking solutions. Customers can access their accounts through both web-based platforms and mobile applications, allowing for account management and financial transactions from multiple devices. The bank provides helpful financial tools and resources to support customer banking needs, though specific product details are not fully outlined on their home page.

The Citizens State Bank and Trust Company distinguishes itself through its commitment to consumer privacy and transparent cookie policies. The institution explicitly states it does not use cookies for advertisements or tracking purposes, focusing only on essential functionality. Their branding as "The Extra Mile Bank" suggests a customer service orientation, though detailed service differentiators are not prominently featured on the accessible website content.

Prospective customers should note that the publicly available website content is limited, focusing primarily on login and compliance information rather than detailed product specifications, interest rates, or fee structures. The bank operates as a traditional brick-and-mortar institution with digital banking channels, making it suitable for customers seeking established banking services with federal insurance protections. Full product details and service offerings would require direct customer contact or access to complete website sections.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Offers both online and mobile banking platforms for account access
Transparent privacy policy with no advertising or tracking cookies
Member FDIC status provides regulatory oversight and consumer protection
Established trust company with heritage banking services
Equal Housing Lender status indicates fair lending compliance
Provides helpful financial tools to customers
cons: Limited product information available on public website
No visible interest rates, fees, or service charges disclosed
Requires login to access full banking information, limiting transparency
No information about minimum deposit requirements or account types
Limited details about customer service hours or support channels
best_for: Customers seeking traditional banking with federal deposit insurance
Users who prefer online and mobile banking options
Individuals prioritizing privacy and limited data tracking
diagnosis: The Citizens State Bank and Trust Company is best for traditional banking customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit accounts with digital banking convenience. The primary caveat is that detailed product information, rates, and fees are not transparently disclosed on the public website, requiring direct inquiry for full service specifications.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
